title: Frontend: Citation Display Enhancement
description: Minimal frontend changes to improve citation display: add citation count badge, fix truncation to 200 chars, add expand-to-full-text toggle.
acceptance_criteria: Citation count shown in answer header (e.g., '3 citations')
Snippet truncation at 200 chars with '...' ellipsis
Expand/collapse toggle to show full paragraph text
Empty snippet defense (show 'See document' when snippet is empty)
implementation_steps: 1. Add citation count badge to answer header
3. Add expand/collapse toggle for full paragraph
